# Avaab Razzaq - AI Growth Engineer

> AI-powered workflows, full-stack products, and growth systems for businesses.

This website belongs to Avaab Razzaq, an AI Growth Engineer based in Miami, Florida, serving clients across the United States.

## Keywords
AI Growth Engineer, AI Automation Specialist, AI Agent Development, Prompt Engineering Services, MCP Integration, Full-Stack Web Developer, SEO Expert, LLM Integration, ChatGPT Integration, Workflow Automation, Miami Web Developer, Florida AI Consultant, Technical SEO Consultant, React Developer, Astro Framework Expert, SolidJS Developer, Programmatic SEO, Conversion Rate Optimization, Social Media Growth Services

## About Avaab Razzaq
Avaab Razzaq (also known as AR10Dev) is an AI Growth Engineer combining artificial intelligence expertise with full-stack development and SEO strategy. Based in Miami, Florida, he helps businesses automate operations, build high-performance web applications, and drive sustainable organic growth.

### Expertise Areas
- Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning
- Large Language Model (LLM) Integration
- Prompt Engineering & AI Assistants
- Full-Stack Web Development
- Search Engine Optimization (SEO)
- Growth Marketing & Analytics
- Workflow Automation

## Services Offered

### AI & Automation Services
Custom AI solutions for business operations including:
- ChatGPT-style AI assistants trained on business data
- Autonomous AI agent development (LangGraph, CrewAI, MCP)
- Multi-agent workflow automation systems
- Prompt engineering and evaluation frameworks for production AI
- MCP integrations connecting AI agents to business tools
- LLM integrations (OpenAI GPT-4, Anthropic Claude, open-source models)
- Document processing and analysis pipelines
- Lead qualification and CRM automation
- Customer support automation

Technologies: OpenAI API, Anthropic Claude API, LangChain, LangGraph, TypeScript, Python, Vector Databases (Pinecone, Weaviate), Supabase, PostgreSQL

### Full-Stack Web Development
High-performance web applications built with modern frameworks:
- Custom web applications (SaaS, portals, dashboards)
- Landing pages and marketing websites
- E-commerce solutions
- API development (REST, GraphQL)
- Mobile app development (React Native)
- SaaS MVP development

Technologies: Astro, React, SolidJS, Next.js, TypeScript, Node.js, PostgreSQL, TailwindCSS, Vercel, Cloudflare Workers

### SEO & Growth Marketing
Technical SEO and data-driven marketing services:
- Technical SEO audits and Core Web Vitals optimization
- Programmatic SEO (automated content at scale)
- Conversion rate optimization (CRO)
- Social media growth systems powered by AI automation
- Analytics setup and custom dashboards
- A/B testing implementation
- Marketing automation

Tools: Google Search Console, Google Analytics 4, Ahrefs, Screaming Frog, Hotjar, Optimizely, BigQuery

### Blog Posts

#### Building Custom ChatGPT-Style Interfaces for Business
URL: /blog/building-custom-chatgpt-interfaces-for-business/
Description: A practical guide to building custom AI chatbots trained on your business data—from architecture decisions to deployment strategies.
Topics: AI, chatbot, GPT, customer-support, development

#### How to Automate Lead Qualification with AI
URL: /blog/how-to-automate-lead-qualification-with-ai/
Description: Learn how to build AI-powered lead qualification systems that score, route, and nurture leads automatically—saving 20+ hours per week while improving conversion rates.
Topics: AI, automation, lead-generation, sales, workflow

#### OpenAI vs Anthropic: Which LLM is Right for Your Business?
URL: /blog/openai-vs-anthropic-which-llm-for-business/
Description: A practical comparison of OpenAI GPT-4 and Anthropic Claude for business applications—covering capabilities, costs, use cases, and implementation considerations.
Topics: AI, LLM, OpenAI, Anthropic, comparison

#### Complete Technical SEO Audit Checklist for 2025
URL: /blog/complete-technical-seo-audit-checklist-2025/
Description: A comprehensive checklist for technical SEO audits covering Core Web Vitals, crawlability, indexing, structured data, and more—with actionable fixes for each issue.
Topics: SEO, technical-SEO, audit, Core-Web-Vitals, checklist

#### How Programmatic SEO Generates 10x More Traffic
URL: /blog/how-programmatic-seo-generates-10x-traffic/
Description: Learn how programmatic SEO creates thousands of targeted pages from structured data—capturing long-tail search traffic your competitors can't reach manually.
Topics: SEO, programmatic-SEO, content-strategy, automation, growth

#### A/B Testing Best Practices That Actually Improve Conversions
URL: /blog/ab-testing-best-practices-improve-conversions/
Description: Move beyond random testing with a systematic A/B testing framework—including hypothesis formation, statistical rigor, and common mistakes that waste time.
Topics: CRO, A/B testing, conversion-optimization, analytics, growth

#### Building an MVP in 4 Weeks: A Technical Guide
URL: /blog/building-mvp-4-weeks-technical-guide/
Description: A practical guide to shipping your SaaS MVP fast—from scoping and tech stack to launch day, with lessons learned from building multiple successful MVPs.
Topics: MVP, SaaS, startup, development, product

#### Why Astro is the Best Framework for Marketing Sites
URL: /blog/why-astro-best-framework-marketing-sites/
Description: A technical comparison of Astro vs Next.js, Gatsby, and other frameworks for marketing websites—covering performance, DX, and SEO capabilities.
Topics: Astro, full-stack-web-development, performance, SEO, frameworks

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: What services does Avaab Razzaq offer?
A: AI automation, full-stack web development, and SEO/growth marketing services for businesses across the United States.

Q: Where is Avaab Razzaq based?
A: Miami, Florida, USA. Services are provided remotely to clients nationwide.

Q: How can I contact Avaab Razzaq?
A: Email itsavaab@gmail.com or book a call at cal.com/avaabrazzaq

Q: What AI technologies does Avaab work with?
A: OpenAI GPT-4, Anthropic Claude, LangChain, vector databases, and custom LLM integrations.

Q: What web frameworks does Avaab specialize in?
A: Astro, React, SolidJS, Next.js, and Node.js with TypeScript.
